title: Delete CustomLabel.tsx — confirmed dead code
bug: `web-react-ts/src/components/pie-chart/CustomLabel.tsx` (a recharts pie-chart label component) had zero importers anywhere in the app. It was flagged as dead code while working SYN-201 but left untouched there; it has been sitting in the tree ever since with no code path reaching it, adding dead weight to the bundle for no user-facing benefit.
summary: Deleted `web-react-ts/src/components/pie-chart/CustomLabel.tsx`. Before removing it, verified with repo-wide `grep` for both `CustomLabel` and `pie-chart` that nothing imports it — no relative import, no barrel re-export, no dynamic `import()`/`require()` string, and no test file references it. Confirmed again after deletion that the search returns zero hits.
evidenceNote: This is a pure dead-code deletion with zero importers and no rendered UI surface, so no before/after screenshots apply. Proof is the verification gates below plus an independent `code-reviewer` pass that re-ran the same reference search and found no remaining callers.

checks.label: Tests (288/289 passing; 1 pre-existing failure in createApolloClient.test.tsx confirmed present on base commit via git stash, unrelated to this change)
code-reviewer (no importers found, deletion confirmed safe)

followUps: `CustomLegend.tsx` and `PieChart.css` in the same `pie-chart/` directory are now fully orphaned (zero remaining importers) — delete them together in a follow-up cleanup ticket.

`web-react-ts/kb/02-design-system.md:88` and `.claude/commands/new-component.md:41` still reference `components/pie-chart` as a chart component/example folder to keep — update those once the directory is fully removed.
